title: rubus × polychaetus
intro: Rubus × polychaetus, a hybrid species of raspberry, is a cross between the fragaria (strawberry) and rubus (raspberry) plant families. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × polychaetus include reducing swelling and pain, as well as aiding in wound healing and preventing infection. Herbal preparations of Rubus × polychaetus can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to address skin issues and promote overall well-being.
